configurations.name: rails-api
runtimeArgs: export PATH=$HOME/.rvm/rubies/ruby-3.4.1/bin:$HOME/.rvm/gems/ruby-3.4.1/bin:$PATH && export GEM_HOME=$HOME/.rvm/gems/ruby-3.4.1 && export GEM_PATH=$HOME/.rvm/gems/ruby-3.4.1:$HOME/.rvm/gems/ruby-3.4.1@global && cd api && bin/rails server -p $PORT -b 0.0.0.0
